description: Automatic metadata update mechanisms for the wiki. Agent triggers rebuilds after any wiki edit.

modes.use_when: After any wiki edit (create/update/delete) in Ingest/Query/Lint.
Index-only rebuild: H1 headers + first sentences per category. Trigger: after create_page/update_existing (Ingest), or after link_validation (Lint).

agent_note: Never call manually outside process flow. Triggered automatically at defined hook points in process files.
